title: katabrabeuo #2603
definition:
1) to decide as umpire against someone
 2) to defraud or beguile of the prize of victory
 3) metaph. to deprive of salvation
nasbUsage:
Definition: 1) to decide as umpire against someone
 2) to defraud or beguile of the prize of victory
 3) metaph. to deprive of salvation

    NASB:  to give judgment against:
